person.name: Anne Echingham
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
«b»Biography«/b»
Anne Echingham (or Echyngham) was born in or about the 1420s, the daughter of Sir Thomas Echingham. Her exact date of birth is unknown, but as her father was born in 1301 and her son Henry was born in 1448, a date much before or much after the 1420s would be problematic. No contemporary sources have been found identifying her mother, and it is possible that Sir Thomas married twice, but the consensus amongst modern sources is that Anne is the daughter of Margaret Knyvet, who had married Anne's father no later than 1426. This is supported by the 1530 heralds' visitation of Sussex, though its genealogy of the Echingham family contains several inaccuracies.

Anne married John Rogers of Bryanston, Dorset, and had a son in 1448, probably their only child. The marriage is documented in letters patent from 1451, which talks of "John Roger, son and heir of John Roger of Brianeston" and "the said John Roger of Brianeston and Anne his wife, daughter of Thomas Echyngham, knight". (The visitation of Sussex incorrectly gives Anne's husband's name as Thomas Rogers.) John Rogers died in 1450 and the letters patent grant the manors of Bryanston and Sutton Waldron to Anne, with remainder to the heirs of her and John. That the grant is only to Anne seems consistent with John being dead, even though it doesn't say so explicitly.

After John's death, Anne married John Tuchet, Lord Audley. According to a genealogy compiled in 1853 by George Harrison, the then Windsor Herald, they married before 1456, though no evidence is given for this. Regardless of the date, it is certain that it was John Roger's widow who married John, Lord Audley, for in her will, dated 11 Nov 1497, she asks for prayers for "the soules of John late Lord Audeley late my husband, James late Lord Audeley my sonne, and John Rogers late also my husbande."

Her second husband, Lord Audley, died on 26 September 1490, and Anne died on 7 May 1498. She asked to be buried under the tower of St Saviour's monastery, Bermondsey, Surrey. Her son Henry Rogers was her executor and inherited the bulk of her estate: in Dorset, the manors and advowsons of Bryanston and Sutton Waldron, a burgage in Bridport, and the advowsons of St Mary Bridport and Maiden Newton; in Somerset, the manors and advowsons of Sparkford and Kilve; in Hampshire, the manor and advowson of Dibden, and the manor of Marsh Court near Stockbridge; and in Lincolnshire, the manor of Sapperton.

zh.Bryanston, Dorset, England: 英國英格蘭多瑟特布陽斯頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Echingham於大約1429年出生在英國素可時，她的父親Sir Thomas Echyngham29歲，母親Margaret Knyvet35歲。她與John Touchet結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1498年5月7日在英國素瑞貝爾蒙享年70歲，埋葬在英國素瑞貝爾蒙。

zh-hans.Bryanston, Dorset, England: 英国英格兰多瑟特布陽斯頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Echingham于大约1429年出生在英国素可时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Echyngham29岁，母亲Margaret Knyvet35岁。她与John Touchet结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1498年5月7日在英国素瑞貝爾蒙享年70岁，埋葬在英国素瑞貝爾蒙。

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Echingham was born about 1429, in Sussex, England, her father, Sir Thomas Echyngham, was 29 and her mother, Margaret Knyvet, was 35. She married John Touchet. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 7 May 1498, in Bermondsey, Surrey, England, at the age of 70, and was buried in Bermondsey, Surrey, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Echingham est née environ 1429, à Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Echyngham, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Margaret Knyvet, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé John Touchet. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 7 mai 1498, à Bermondsey, Surrey, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterrée à Bermondsey, Surrey, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Echingham um 1429 in Sussex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Echyngham 29 und ihre Mutter Margaret Knyvet 35. Sie hat John Touchet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 7. Mai 1498 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Bermondsey, Surrey, England und wurde in Bermondsey, Surrey, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Echingham è nata il circa 1429 nel Sussex, England, sua padre, Sir Thomas Echyngham, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Margaret Knyvet, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato John Touchet. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 7 maggio 1498, nel Bermondsey, Surrey, England, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolta a Bermondsey, Surrey, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Echinghamが約1429年にイギリススセックスで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Echynghamは29歳，母Margaret Knyvetは35歳であった。John Touchetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1498年5月7日にイギリススリーバーモンドセイで70歳で死去し，イギリススリーバーモンドセイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Echingham(이)가 대략 1429년 영국 수세스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Echyngham(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Knyvet(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 John Touchet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1498년 5월 7일 영국 수리 버몽시에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수리 버몽시에 묻혔다.

mn.Bryanston, Dorset, England: Bryanston, Dorseteschyre, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Echingham nasceu aproximadamente 1429, em Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Echyngham, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Knyvet, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com John Touchet. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 7 de maio de 1498, em Bermondsey, Surrey, Inglaterra, com 70 anos, e foi sepultada em Bermondsey, Surrey, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Echingham родилась около 1429 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Echyngham было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Knyvet, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Touchet. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 7 мая 1498 г. в местности бирмондси, сурри, Англия в возрасте 70 лет и была похоронена в местности бирмондси, сурри, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Echingham nació aproximadamente 1429, en Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Echyngham, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Margaret Knyvet, tenía 35 años. Se casó con John Touchet. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 7 de mayo de 1498, en Bermondsey, Surrey, Inglaterra, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultada en Bermondsey, Surrey, Inglaterra.
